// This file is auto-generated. Do not edit manually.
// Structure: Array
#include <array>
#include <cstring>
#include <cstdint>
#include <limits>
#include <string_view>

class fastdata final {
    static constexpr std::array<std::string_view, 2> keys = {
        u8"suffix", u8"prefix"
    };

    public:
    [[nodiscard]]
    static constexpr bool contains(const std::string_view key) noexcept {


        for (size_t i = 0; i < 2; i++)
        {
            if (keys[i] == key)
                return true;
        }
        return false;
    }

    static constexpr size_t item_count = 2;
    static constexpr size_t min_key_length = 6;
    static constexpr size_t max_key_length = 6;
    static constexpr bool has_number = false;
    static constexpr bool has_uppercase = false;
    static constexpr bool has_lowercase = true;
    static constexpr bool has_symbol = false;
    static constexpr bool has_whitespace = false;
};
